title: How Do You Do? My Very Own Angel!
overview: Misaki moves to Tokyo to live with her aunt.

title: Do Your Best, Hikaru! It's Your First Fight!
overview: Misaki gets confused on her way to the first day of school when she meets Hatoko, a girl who knows a lot about Angelic Layer.

title: Who Are You? Misaki's Nervous Lesson!
overview: Icchan gets Misaki an Angel Card, a membership that will allow her to enter official tournaments.

title: The Day an Angel Flew Down!
overview: After choosing her entry line Misaki and her friends attend the regional Championships.

title: I Don't Want to Lose! I'm Believing in Hikaru!
overview: Misaki enjoys playing Angelic Layer and she loves Hikaru with all her heart, but when she goes up against the Power-type Vasquez, her confidence and self-esteem falters.

title: Suzuka, the Speed of Light! Hotoko's Declaration of Rivalry!
overview: Misaki goes up against Hotoko and her Angel, Suzuka.

title: Fight at the Edge: Misaki's Last Chance!
overview: Against her next opponent, Misaki tries to overcome her fear of losing.

title: Misaki vs. Misaki? A Dangerous Classmate!
overview: Misaki plays Angelic Layer with a boy from her class.

title: Sing, Misaki! Is the Deus an Idol?!
overview: Misaki has a chance encounter with an idol.

title: Mean Sisters! Hikaru, the Target!
Finish It Off! Hikaru & Mao's Important Game!
Misaki & Kotaro: Their Exciting Date!
Pure White Blanche: Kaede's Smile!
I Won't Give Up! And an Angel Was Born!
Shirahime vs. Suzuka! Secret of the Ice Machine!
The Final Game! Hikaru's Last Attack!
I've Made My Mind Up on You! The One Misaki Selected!
overview: Misaki has made it all the way to the National Games, but before the competition begins, there is one more thing she must do—find someone to act as her second during the upcoming fights.

title: Many Strong Opponents! The National Games of Everyone's Dreams!
overview: With Hatoko by her side, Misaki heads for the opening ceremony of the National Games, determined to do her best no matter how stiff the competition.

title: System Down! Decisive Fight on a Ship in a Storm!
Is Icchan the Enemy? The Puzzling Second Game!
Summertime in the Sea! Someone Is in Love With Someone!
Suddenly Just the Two of Us: Secret Double Dates!
Break Up the Magical Wall! Misaki vs. Ohjiro!
overview: The National Semis are here and it's Hikaru vs. Wizard, Ohjiro's Angel.

title: Reach Misaki! This Thought Goes Over the Rainbow!
overview: Misaki ponders the days when she was writing letters to her mother.

title: Reunion of Destiny: Angels Wet With Tears!
overview: The secret is finally out! Shuko has told Misaki that she is her mother.

title: Angels Wings! Please Guide Me and Hikaru!
overview: Misaki and Hikaru are in the finals, and she is ready for biggest match ever as she faces three-time champion Athena, who is commanded by none other than her mother!
